text: Entering this modern, glass-walled space, I am met by an exhibition dedicated to "R+D"—research and development. I feel a quiet awe, mixed with curiosity. The clinical order of the room and the colorful, information-rich walls invite reflection. Here, human ingenuity and machine intelligence intersect; I am inspired to contemplate how knowledge grows and how we might coexist with the very systems we imagine and build.
